subject: feat(tones): add tone tagging to notes and proposals
body:
Tone tags let users convey intent when adding notes or proposing changes.
Adapted from synctone's tone system with agreement-specific defaults
(clarification, suggestion, concern, firm, supportive, urgent).

New files:
- src/constants/tones.ts: defaults, color hashing, normalization
- src/utils/recentTones.ts: localStorage persistence for custom tones
- src/components/common/ToneSelector.tsx: inline picker (defaults, recent, custom)
- src/components/common/TonePills.tsx: read-only colored pill display

Integration:
- AddNoteForm & ProposeChangeForm: ToneSelector at creation time
- NotesList & ProposalCard: TonePills display
- useNotes & useProposals hooks: sender_tone in create operations
- All page-level handlers updated to thread tones through

Database:
- Migration adds sender_tone text[] to sancio_notes and sancio_proposals

Tags: feature, tones, notes, proposals, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: tone-tagging
Semver: minor
